name: Longsword
description: A versatile martial weapon with a straight, double-edged blade. Deals 1d8 slashing damage (1d10 two-handed).

name: Shortbow
description: A simple ranged weapon. Deals 1d6 piercing damage. Range 80/320.

name: Greataxe
description: A heavy martial weapon favored by barbarians. Deals 1d12 slashing damage.

name: Dagger
description: A simple melee weapon with the finesse, light, and thrown properties. Deals 1d4 piercing damage.

name: Chain Mail
description: Made of interlocking metal rings. AC 16, requires Str 13. Disadvantage on Stealth.

name: Leather Armor
description: The breastpiece and shoulder protectors are made of leather. AC 11 + Dex modifier.

name: Shield
description: A wooden or metal shield carried in one hand. +2 AC.

name: Studded Leather
description: Tough but flexible leather reinforced with rivets. AC 12 + Dex modifier.

name: Healing Potion
description: A vial of red liquid that shimmers when agitated. Restores 2d4+2 hit points when consumed.

name: Greater Healing Potion
description: A vial of bright red liquid. Restores 4d4+4 hit points when consumed.

name: Antitoxin
description: A vial of antitoxin. Grants advantage on saving throws against poison for 1 hour.

name: Rope (50 ft)
description: Hempen rope, 50 feet. Has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.

name: Torch (10)
description: A bundle of 10 torches. Each burns for 1 hour, providing bright light in a 20-foot radius.

name: Backpack
description: A standard adventurer's backpack. Can hold 1 cubic foot or 30 pounds of gear.

name: Rations (10 days)
description: Dry foods suitable for extended travel, including jerky, dried fruit, and hardtack.

name: Thieves' Tools
description: A set of picks and tools for disabling traps and opening locks. Required for Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks to pick locks.

name: Bag of Holding
description: This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions. It can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet.

name: Cloak of Protection
description: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while you wear this cloak. Requires attunement.

name: Flame Tongue
description: When you speak this sword's command word, flames erupt from the blade. While ablaze, it deals an extra 2d6 fire damage.

name: Staff of Power
description: This staff grants a +2 bonus to AC, saving throws, and spell attack rolls. It has 20 charges for casting spells. Requires attunement by a sorcerer, warlock, or wizard.

name: Vorpal Sword
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a roll of 20, it cuts off one of the target's heads.
